title: CRYONETICS SMP
description:
Official Modpack For Voltcore's Newly Added Installment : "Cryonetics"


"Explore A World Full of Dangerous Creatures With Hardcore Temperature And Sanity And Thirst A World They Said Was Impossible To Live In Impossible To Survive In This World"
body:
### ● Official Modpack For Voltcore's Newly Added Installment : "Cryonetics"

The server-side version of the modpack is only made for dedicated servers it does not have any client side mods
If your playing on singleplayer get the client-side version 
<details>
<summary>Lore</summary>

  
"Explore a world full of dangerous creatures with hardcore temperature and thirst a world they said was impossible to live in impossible to survive in this world is either two rules hunt or get hunted the history of this world is unknown. Can you discover it?"


</details>




Features :

● Temperature

● Thirst

● New World Generation (Terralith and others)

● New Biomes (Biomes O Plenty and others)

● Security Craft

● Decorations



Will you survive and thrive or will you be buried in the depths of the unknown?

Warning: This modpack contains flashing lights, visual effects, and horror elements such as zombies, which may trigger seizures or other medical issues.


## ● Credits of (| Cryonetics |)
